raw_output:
PR #148 security review (Claude, Fable 5). NO FINDINGS; one info item verified acceptable: the doc's 'avg 446.9' and test fixtures reuse the owner's real sleep aggregates, but they are exactly the values the owner himself posted in public issue #147 (confirmed via gh issue view) — coarse, owner-published, no exposure expansion. Verified against docs/THREAT_MODEL.md: no HTML sink (evidence renders as JSX text, CorrelationList.tsx; no dangerouslySetInnerHTML; report HTML path untouched — T-04/T-12); no backend changes at all (T-01/T-02); no new dependency (package.json untouched, T-13), no logging (T-16), no token/DB-path handling (T-07/T-08); no .github/workflows or scripts/review_gate.py changes; acceptance doc has no secrets/PII beyond owner-published quotes; trust boundaries touched: none (B2 payload shape unchanged — outcome field pre-existing).

--- Post-review delta ---
Branch advanced during/after review: 70e2621 (reviewed initial tip) -> 4144ebe (docs-only: acceptance QA item 4; leg diffed the delta and re-confirmed) -> f5b365b (docs-only: acceptance QA items 5+6, owner-reported live results incl. the best-night tie-break finding) -> 3c3fb30 (fix round: comment wording nit fixed; acceptance-doc issues-vs-PRs phrasing nit fixed; #142/#143 milestone-tagged on GitHub resolving the bookkeeping half). Negative-input hardening nit dismissed (unreachable: bin means of Oura-sourced non-negative duration columns, no manual-entry path). Post-fix verification: prettier clean, effectFormat tests 10/10; full suite 322/45 green at the reviewed tip; delta commits are docs/comment-only.

findings.summary: Owner's real sleep aggregates appear in committed doc + test fixtures
findings.reason: exactly the values the owner himself posted in public issue #147; coarse aggregates; no exposure expansion
